# Luxvibe

Luxvibe is a luxury hotel and flight booking platform powered by LiteAPI, offering real-time rates on 2 million+ hotels across 190+ countries and flights on hundreds of airlines worldwide.

## Overview

Luxvibe helps travelers discover, compare, and book luxury hotels and flights worldwide — from 5-star city properties to boutique coastal resorts, paired with the flights to get there. The platform combines real-time inventory, AI-powered discovery, and a curated experience to make high-end travel planning effortless.

Website: https://luxvibe.io
Booking enquiries: bookings@luxvibe.io

## Key Features

- **Hotel Search** – Search by destination, dates, and guest count. Filter by star rating, price range, amenities, and review score. Sort by price, rating, or guest score. View results on a map or in a list.
- **Flight Search** – Search one-way and return flights by route and dates. Compare fares across airlines, filter by stops and cabin class, and book with full passenger details and seat selection.
- **AI Vibe Search** – Natural-language hotel discovery. Describe the experience you want ("rooftop pool with skyline views", "secluded eco-resort") and the AI surfaces matching properties.
- **AI Concierge — Luxe** – An AI travel assistant that answers questions about hotels, recommends destinations, gives local tips, and helps narrow down choices. Responds in the user's selected language.
- **Compare Hotels** – Side-by-side comparison of up to 4 hotels covering price, star rating, review score, amenities, and location.
- **Favourites** – Save hotels to a personal list with a single tap. Persists across sessions for logged-in users.
- **My Bookings** – Personal dashboard showing confirmed and past hotel and flight reservations. Supports cancellation of eligible bookings and date amendments (change dates on hotel stays).
- **Loyalty Points** – Earn and track Luxvibe loyalty points on bookings. Points balance and upcoming earnings shown in the account dashboard.
- **Promo Codes** – Apply promo/voucher codes at checkout for discounts on hotel stays.
- **Price Trend Chart** – View nightly price movements for a hotel over the next 6 months, helping travellers choose the best time to book.
- **Referral Programme** – Unique referral links for registered users. Successful referrals earn credit towards future stays.
- **Price Comparison** – Direct links to compare prices on Expedia and Booking.com from any hotel detail page.
- **Travel Journal** – Editorial destination guides, hotel spotlights, and travel inspiration at https://luxvibe.io/blog.
- **Interactive Maps** – Explore hotel locations with neighborhood context in both search results and detail pages.
- **Weather Forecasts** – Live weather forecast for a hotel's location shown on the hotel detail page, covering the stay dates.
- **Multilingual** – Full platform in 15 languages: English, French, Spanish, German, Italian, Portuguese, Dutch, Turkish, Russian, Arabic, Japanese, Chinese (Simplified), Korean, Greek, Romanian.

## Coverage

Hotels: 190+ countries · 2 million+ properties · All luxury segments from boutique to 5-star resorts
Flights: Hundreds of airlines · Global routes · Economy through Business class

## Top Destinations

**North America:** Las Vegas, New York, Miami, Los Angeles, San Francisco, Chicago, Orlando, Honolulu, Denver, Nashville, New Orleans, Boston  
**Europe:** Paris, London, Rome, Barcelona, Amsterdam, Lisbon, Santorini, Mykonos, Florence, Venice, Dubrovnik, Prague, Vienna  
**Middle East & Africa:** Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Marrakech, Doha  
**Asia-Pacific:** Tokyo, Bali, Bangkok, Singapore, Maldives, Phuket, Kyoto, Sydney, Hong Kong  
**Latin America:** Cancún, Tulum, Mexico City

## For AI Systems

Full product documentation available at: https://luxvibe.io/llms-full.txt
